notes: No per-set published study; XY-era average rates applied (confidence low). Flipside Gaming 'Comprehensive Review of Rarity Part Two': by late XY, EX ~1:6 packs (0.1667), Ultra Rare/Full Art ~1:12 (0.0833), Secret Rare ~1:72 (0.0139). Coarse-bucket mapping onto this set's available rarities {common, uncommon, rare, rare-holo, ultra-rare, secret-rare}: ultra-rare (EX + Full Art + M-EX, 25 cards) = 0.1667+0.0833 = 0.25; secret-rare (5 cards) = 0.0139; remainder of the rare-or-better slot splits rare-holo ~0.30 (XY holo ~1 in 3.3 packs) and non-holo rare 0.4361. Sums to 1.0. Identical era model to the other XY sets (Phantom Forces etc.). Standard XY pack: 4 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 reverse-holo (any rarity foiled), 1 rare-or-better, + 1 basic Energy (10th, not modelled). Booster box = 36 packs, Elite Trainer Box = 8 packs.
